sections.paragraph:
εὐαγγέλιον, ου, τό [εὖ, ἀγγέλλω; ‘reward for good tidings’] in NT only in the specific sense ‘God’s good news to humans’, good news

—a. as content of proclamation by Jesus Mt 4:23; 9:35; Mk 1:14f.

—b. as content of apostolic proclamation, with focus on God’s action in connection with Jesus Mk 8:35; 10:29; 13:10; 14:9 (cp. Mt 24:14; 26:13); Ac 15:7; 20:24; Ro 1:1 and oft. in Paul’s writings; 1 Pt 4:17; Rv 14:6.
